description: Style NoteSpun from our irresistibly soft cotton, this is a blissfully cosy T-shirt. Sporting a print on the chest, this tee from myntra gives a fresh twist to an off-duty staple, making it an ideal add to your cool casual wardrobe. Style it with shorts or jeans, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for that perfect man-about-town nonchalance. Product DetailsBlack T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves and a graphic print on the chestMaterial and care100% cottonWash in cold waterDo not bleach, soak or wringWarm iron on reverseSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
